title: CRDs, Controllers, Operators, Admission Policies, Webhooks, and Extension Trust · Mastery Check
summary: A release review compares fresh crds, controllers, operators, admission policies, webhooks, and extension trust choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for trusted extension API and controller contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design CRD names, scope, versions, structural OpenAPI schemas, defaulting, validation, pruning, status subresource, scale, storage version, and conversion.
Build or evaluate controllers from watches, work queues, level-based reconciliation, ownership, idempotency, finalizers, status, retries, leader election, and rate limits.
Choose built-in admission, ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, validating webhook, or mutating webhook from expressiveness, failure policy, ordering, timeout, availability, and audit needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion · changed case · Quiz K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz CRD changes schema without conversion, a webhook fails closed during outage, and an operator hot-loops while fighting field ownership. Bound extension API, defaulting, validation, conversion, admission availability, reconciliation, and uninstall.

Which action demonstrates K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion · changed case · Quiz K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design crd names, scope, versions, structural openapi schemas, defaulting, validation, pruning, status subresource, scale, storage version, and conversion. For K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion · changed case · Quiz K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion, keep K8s Crd Schema Status Conversion connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
